The '''''Vanguard''-class heavy assault gunship''' was an assault vessel manufactured by CEC during the tail end of the Republic. Though it was initially met with lukewarm reception due to logistical problems, it found better appreciation during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

{{Ship-stub}}
